element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns directional fire control immediately; holding fire button locks direction
Decoupled from fire direction; fundamental to combat positioning
Screen moves left-to-right initially; teaches screen boundary constraint mechanic
First weapon upgrade; more powerful than basic cannon
Mid-tier weapon upgrade with increased damage radius
Most powerful weapon; highest damage output

element_introduction_order.element: Secret rooms with directional screen gaps
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Requires precise timing to enter; optional high-risk, high-reward resource gathering
Some branches more challenging; introduces routing decisions within linear progression
Gate progression to next level; escalate challenge beyond standard enemy patterns
Screen can move in any cardinal direction; requires continuous spatial reorientation

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Frantic with variable intensity; tension builds through enemy accumulation and environmental threat (screen edges), relieved by power-up acquisition and enemy clearance. Boss gates create escalating challenge rhythms across seven levels.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Gaps at screen edges with correct timing entry trigger secret rooms containing power-ups
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Precisely-timed entry into side-screen gaps reveals off-axis secret rooms; higher difficulty levels require tighter timing and offer fewer secrets

difficulty_curve.early_game: Basic cannon baseline; Stage 1 teaches screen boundary constraint and 8-directional fire mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Path forks introduce routing complexity; weapon upgrades available; screen direction changes increase spatial disorientation
difficulty_curve.late_game: Multiple weapon upgrades active; screen direction changes more frequent; boss difficulty escalates toward final Burai base
notable_spikes: Path fork selection on harder difficulties

notable_level_patterns.description: Primarily linear sidescroll within each stage, but forks allow left/right path selection for short segments; one path typically more challenging than the other
Player must keep pace with auto-scrolling screen; falling off leading edge results in death; creates persistent spatial threat independent of enemy placement
Gaps at screen edges allow player to enter perpendicular secret rooms if timed correctly; optional power-up rewards at cost of momentary exposure
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Varies by difficulty; fewer on Ace/Ultimate

notable_level_patterns.description: Each stage concludes with mandatory boss fight before progression to next level
